CONSTRUCTION AND ENGINEERING CONTRACT
This agreement is governed by the laws of Indonesia. Any dispute shall be referred to the courts of Jakarta.
The scope of services includes building construction as defined in the drawings.
Payment terms are based on milestones.
The contractor warrants the work for 12 months after completion.
Each party shall maintain comprehensive liability insurance and indemnify the other against claims.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
